title: Temple Spring Loofah Shower Sponge, Recycled Body Scrubber Scrunchies, Exfoliating Bath Sponge, Shower Puff Bath Sponges for Adults, Loofah Back Scrubber Pouffe, Loofa Body Scrub Exfoliator Coral Pink
features: Stylish and Sustainable Shower Puff – Made from dense layers of fully recycled mesh material, this luxurious puff works as an african net sponge, loofah, or shower puff, creating a rich foam lather for your bath.
Convenient Ribbon Handle – Easily hang and dry your bathroom sponge or shower loofah on the suction hook provided, ensuring hygiene and quick drying in your bathroom.

Gentle Exfoliation – This versatile body scrubber doubles as a body scrub exfoliator or exfoliating sponge, leaving your skin feeling soft and refreshed. Ideal for bath sponges for adults or as part of your bath accessories.

Luxurious Bubbles – Designed to provide a rich lather, these bath sponges and shower sponges enhance your bathing routine, whether you use them as a loofah sponge, or body sponge. These multipurpose sponges can also serve as a loofah back scrubber, shower scrubber, or bathroom sponge, adding convenience to your bath accessories.

Value Multi-Pack – Includes 3 x 60g shower puffs or body puffs with stylish, recyclable packaging. Perfect for those who prefer a loofa, african wash net, or shower scrunchie for their spa-like experience. *Please note packaging may vary from the images shown as we are re-branding. The products remain the same high quality*

Recharge. 1 2 3 4 5 Previous page Next page Thank you for choosing recycled plastics Protect Our Natural World Turtles and marine life suffer from ocean plastics, with over 1 million seabirds and 100,000 marine animals dying yearly from entanglement or ingestion. 52% of sea turtles have ingested plastic, mistaking it for food, causing starvation or internal injuries. Ghost nets trap dolphins, seals, and fish, leading to suffocation or drowning. Reducing plastic waste and using recycled materials can help protect wildlife and restore marine ecosystems. Using Recycled Plastic Products Can Help! Using our recycled plastic shower loofahs helps reduce ocean plastic by repurposing waste that might otherwise end up in landfills or waterways. It also lowers demand for new plastic production, cutting pollution and conserving resources. This reduces plastic waste entering the ocean, protecting marine life from harm. Sustainable choices like these help create a cleaner, healthier planet for future generations . Please recycle after use. Made with 100% Post-consumer Recycled Polyethylene It Doesn't Cost the Earth! Our manufacturer is certified by Control Union. They are inspected and assessed in accordance with the Global Recycled Standard (GRS) 4.0 Certificate No: CU1006722GRS-2020-00016283 Registration No: 1006722 The video showcases the product in use. Temple Spring Recycled Plastic Beach Video Merchant video Do they maintain shape and integrity after use? Yes, these luxury poufs are well made, hold their shape & don't fall apart after use. Are they suitable for sensitive skin types? Yes, but we don't recommend using them on sore or damaged skin areas. Do they produce a rich lather easily? These shower loofahs produce a rich, indulgent lather and can reduce by half the amount of shower gel, or soap, you normally use. Are they easy to clean and maintain? Yes, with the correct care: 1. Let them hang dry after each use. 2. Soak in a mild disinfectant solution, or machine wash weekly at 30°C to 40°C (86°F to 104°F). 3. Replace every 4-6 weeks Are they free from harsh chemicals or dyes? Yes!.
